title: Cherry Blossom Hearts
description: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with Cherry Blossom pink hearts and the green experience bar with Cherry Blossom pink.
body: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with Cherry Blossom pink hearts and the green experience bar with Cherry Blossom pink. This pack is great for celebrating the new Cherry Blossom biome and trees, and is also good for players wanting a pinker HUD.
